articles.title: These new speed boards in Jamaica Plain, on the Esplanade track cyclists’ speeds, not just cars
articles.description:
So far, the speed boards have achieved what officials describe as the desired effect of slowing down traffic on specific paths, DCR says.

The post These new speed boards in Jamaica Plain, on the Esplanade track cyclists’ speeds, not just cars appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New speed boards installed in Jamaica Plain track cyclists' speeds and reduce traffic.
DCR reports significant traffic slowdown on specific paths since installation.
Residents benefit from safer cycling conditions along the Esplanade.

articles.title: Thousands demand Wu address street safety after cyclist killed in crash
articles.description:
Signed by 2,300 Boston residents, the letter emphasizes residents and advocates have asked the mayor for street safety improvement for years.

The post Thousands demand Wu address street safety after cyclist killed in crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cyclist killed in crash prompts 2,300 residents to demand action from Mayor Wu.
Residents have requested street safety improvements for years, highlighting ongoing concerns.
Increased pressure on city officials to enhance safety measures for cyclists and pedestrians.

articles.title: Police investigating after man, woman in their 70s found dead in Maine home
articles.description:
Authorities are trying to determine how the two died, according to Maine State Police.

The post Police investigating after man, woman in their 70s found dead in Maine home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine State Police are investigating the deaths of a man and woman in their 70s.
Authorities have not yet determined the cause of death as of July 16, 2026.
Boston residents may feel increased concern over safety and health in nearby communities.

articles.title: Multiple issues after getting an SUV back from the body shop
articles.description:
John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, hears from a reader having issues with an SUV after getting it back from the body shop.

The post Multiple issues after getting an SUV back from the body shop appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Paul from AAA Northeast addresses SUV issues post-body shop repairs.
Reader reports multiple problems after vehicle repair, highlighting common post-service concerns.
Boston residents advised to thoroughly check vehicles after body shop services to avoid complications.

articles.title: AP Exclusive: ICE officer in Maine shooting has history of violent behavior, family and records say
articles.description:
David Brouillette has a history of terrifying and violent behavior, according to relatives.

The post AP Exclusive: ICE officer in Maine shooting has history of violent behavior, family and records say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICE officer David Brouillette involved in a shooting incident in Maine.
Brouillette has a documented history of violent behavior, according to family records.
Concerns raised about public safety and accountability for law enforcement in Boston.

articles.title: Officers shot at during Dorchester traffic stop, police say, prompting outcry from union
articles.description:
Police says investigators found ballistic damage to the windshield of a cruiser.

The post Officers shot at during Dorchester traffic stop, police say, prompting outcry from union appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Officers were shot at during a traffic stop in Dorchester on July 16.
Investigators found ballistic damage to a police cruiser’s windshield.
The incident has prompted an outcry from the police union, raising safety concerns.
